response.justification: Candidate has ~14 years of software development experience, including recent full-stack work with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS at Optilyz, plus current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators) at re:cinq. Strong polyglot background, demonstrated TDD/craftsmanship practices, MongoDB and Docker experience, and a track record of end-to-end delivery across web, mobile, and embedded. Gaps in explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest experience, but the foundation is solid enough that ramp-up should be straightforward.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on work with AI agents and MCP frameworks, directly matching a required skill
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing-focused workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience appears limited and dated
Vitest not explicitly listed, though Jest-equivalent testing expertise is implied
